zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Englefield於1478年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾時，她的父親Thomas Englefield23歲，母親Margery Danvers30歲。她於1499年與Robert White在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1556年3月23日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特梅利特享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏恩格利費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Englefield于1478年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾时，她的父亲Thomas Englefield23岁，母亲Margery Danvers30岁。她于1499年与Robert White在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1556年3月23日在英国英格兰薩默塞特梅利特享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏恩格利費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Englefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from either of two places called Englefield (in Berks and Surrey).  Compare  Inglefield  .

variants.name: Inglefield
meanings: English: locative name from Englefield (Surrey), recorded as Ingelfeld in 1282, or Englefield (Berks).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Englefield was born in 1478, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Englefield, was 23 and her mother, Margery Danvers, was 30. She married Robert White in 1499, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 23 March 1556, in Merriott, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Englefield est née en 1478, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Englefield, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margery Danvers, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Robert White en 1499, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 mars 1556, à Merriott, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Englefield, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Englefield 1478 in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Englefield 23 und ihre Mutter Margery Danvers 30. Sie hat 1499 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Robert White geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. März 1556 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Merriott, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Englefield è nata il nel 1478 nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Englefield, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Margery Danvers, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Robert White nel 1499, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 marzo 1556, nel Merriott, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Englefield, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Englefieldが1478年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Englefieldは23歳，母Margery Danversは30歳であった。1499年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでRobert Whiteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1556年3月23日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトメリオットで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアエングレフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Englefield(이)가 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Englefield(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Danvers(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Robert White(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 3월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 머리엇에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 잉글레필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Englefield nasceu em 1478, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Englefield, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margery Danvers, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert White em 1499, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de março de 1556, em Merriott, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Englefield родилась в 1478 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Englefield было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Danvers, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert White в 1499 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 марта 1556 г. в местности мирриотт, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Englefield nació en 1478, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Englefield, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margery Danvers, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Robert White en 1499, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1556, en Merriott, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
